name: Miwon Chemicals Co., Ltd.
summary: Miwon Chemicals Co., Ltd. develops, manufactures, and sells performance chemicals for use in the rubber, detergent, and personal care industries worldwide. Its products include sulfurs; sulfuric acids, oleums, and refined sulfuric acids; linear alkylbenzene and dodecylbenzene sulphonic acids; alkyl and alkyl ether sulfates; and rubber chemicals, such as prevalcanization inhibitors and tire bonding agents. The company was founded in 1959 and is headquartered in Anyang, South Korea.
